channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: End of road - litter, 20th April
item.description:
Significant litter dumped at end of road, in bushes. Flytipping and litter problem area. Street cleaners have recently cleaned the road further up, but need to make their way all the way to the end and clean this pathway leading to Spindle Close as well as the end of the road Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dog poo outside the home of a disabled person, 20th April
item.description:
Large dog poo outside 105 Lynton Rd at the bottom of an accessibility access ramp, the location means someone can’t enter or exit the home without running their wheelchair through it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access vulnerabilities, 20th April
item.description:
It is possible for a small car to pass either side of the security gate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merchants Way, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign damaged, rotated and leaning, 20th April
item.description:
Sign damaged, rotated and leaning

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rivington Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oxenford Street 24/7 Filth Factory, 20th April
item.description:
Southwark Council continuously letting the residents of Oxenford street down refusing to clean the streets of the daily junk the disgusting litter and foul much everywhere Why do our children have to live like this ? The new Mum next door was in tears yesterday when her child found a needle in the street behind the over growing weeds in every single pavement slab Just because we aren't rich and live in East Dulwich doesn't mean our street shouldn't be cleaned and weeded It's so disgusting WHAT IS OUR COUNCIL TAX BEING SPENT ON ?????.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Oxenford Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swings make horrible noise, 20th April
item.description:
Please oil or tighten the swings to make them stop making a horrible frosting noise when in use. Both swings make the noise. It’s horrible for the children and the parents pushing them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Oaks, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of fly tipping., 20th April
item.description:
Sofas, white goods and a lot of rubbish has been left in front of garages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersgrove Avenue, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-15, Carlton Parade, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Directional signage incorrect, 20th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pascal Square, Vauxhall, Greater London

item.category: Street cleaning - Blue bags left on street

item.title: There is still a big dump with other things being added as this fly-tipping is on Lomas Drive the south side of the tower block 355 Queensbridge Road., 20th April
item.description:
There is still a big dump with other things being added as this fly-tipping is on Lomas Drive the south side of the tower block 355 Queensbridge Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White road marking need to be re done faded, 20th April
item.description:
WESTMORELAND ROAD / JUNCTION HAYES ROAD Bromley South. White Road lines need to be re done very faded.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed along Stockwell main road. In siver spray paint. The graffiti is on the back of a bus stop and on various street boxes. There is also graffiti sprayed outside Blair House a residential building., 20th April
item.description:
Grafitti has appeared along Stockwell main road SW9. The graffiti has been sprayed at the back of a bus stop and various street boxes. A large majority of the graffiti is in large silver spray paint done by the same culprit. It unfortunately goes along the length of Stockwell Road. The graffiti has recently been put there at least over a week. Please can it be removed I would be very grateful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Michael's Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling overflow, 20th April
item.description:
I was in the area over the weekend and there has been an overflow of recycling most notably lots of papers which were cluttering the area. Please can this be tidied up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 69 Bloomfield Road London SE18 7JN, 20th April
item.description:
Horrible graffiti. Also racist.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bloomfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
